E.Value: Achievement could not be awarded because gamer profile is not available.
Achievement %NAME could not be awarded because gamer profile is not available.
You already have downloaded the selected track
You cannot post to the Xbox LIVE leaderboards without a connection to Xbox LIVE. Please reconnect now and retry posting. Alternatively you can discard your score and continue playing offline.
\r \r \r Ride inside the ball as long as you can.\r \r \r
\r \r \r Ride the ball as long as you can.\r \r \r

\r \r \r Bailout, fly withand break your bones.
Try to get the rider to roll down the stairs\r \r \r

\r \r \r You have one minute to haul the bombs\r
\r as far as you can. Good luck trooper!\r \r \r
\r \r \r Ride fast to keep the flames small.\r \r \r

\r \r \r You have one minute.\r
\r Make as many flips as you can!\r \r \r

\r \r \r Flip, wheelie and combo. Your style.\r \r \r
\r

\r \r \r Use your riding skills and climb as high as you can.\r \r \r
\r

\r \r \r Bailout\r and fly with.\r \r \r
\r

\r \r \r Use the paddles and go for height.\r
\r Bailoutto gain extra height.\r \r \r
\r \r \r Collect the rings. Each gives some boost.\r \r \r
\r \r \r Collect as many targetsas you can.\r \r \r
\r \r \r The front wheel screw is loose! Wheelie as far as you can go.\r \r \r
The selected bike is invalid in this track
You can only edit tracks created by yourself
You can only share tracks created by yourself
\r \r You got %TARGETS in %TIME\r \r
\r \r Your total score is now %TARGETS in %TIME\r \r
\r \r %PASSED passed %LEFT more to go\r \r
\r \r Race through all the tracks as fast as possible,\r \r
\r \r while trying to break as many targets as possible.\r \r
\r \r You made %FAULTS and got %SCORE\r \r
\r \r Your total score is now %FAULTS and %SCORE\r \r
\r \r %PASSED passed %LEFT more to go\r \r
\r \r Make series of really cool stunts on each track\r \r
\r \r while trying to make as few faults as possible.\r \r

Exit Tournament mode? Any unsaved progress will be lost!
Really exit editor? You have unsaved changes that will be lost.
Do you wish to exit the game? Any unsaved progress will be lost!
Really load another track? You have unsaved changes that will be lost.
Really clear the track? You have unsaved changes that will be lost.
Do you want to replace track "%1"?

You have faulted too many times!
Online features are no longer available as you have disconnected from Xbox LIVE.
You did not choose a device. You will be asked to select a device again before you can save or download user-created tracks. If you want to select a device, go to "Help & Options" menu.
No device was selected. Tracks cannot be downloaded until you have chosen a storage device.
Please select the tracks first before proceeding with the download.
Online features are no longer available as you have disconnected from Xbox LIVE.
You need to login to Xbox LIVE to access online features.
You don't have the required privileges to access user-created content from friends.
You need to login to Xbox LIVE to access online features.
Online features are no longer available as you have disconnected from Xbox LIVE.
You need to login to Xbox LIVE to access online features.
Guest profiles are blocked. Please relogin with a different gamer profile.
How to play the game: Basic gameplay instructions and helpful hints
Online features are no longer available as you have disconnected from Xbox LIVE.
You cannot post to the Xbox LIVE leaderboards without a connection to Xbox LIVE. Please reconnect now and retry posting. Alternatively you can discard your score and continue playing offline.
The storage device you selected was removed. When you download tracks the next time you will be asked for a new device. If only one device is available, that will be automatically chosen.
The storage device you selected was removed. When you load or save a track next time you will be asked for a new device. If only one device is available, that will be automatically chosen.

You need to connect to Xbox LIVE to access online leaderboards.
Could not retrieve scores from Xbox LIVE
None of your friends are yet ranked on this leaderboard.
You are not yet ranked on this leaderboard.
There are no scores on this leaderboard.
You have not played this track yet.
Session records could not be loaded.
You have unlocked the legendary Platinum medals!
Any scores achieved while offline cannot be saved to Xbox LIVE leaderboards. Consider reconnecting to Xbox LIVE.

This might be due to storage device being full or not available. To prevent possible data loss, your progress and settings will not be saved for the current gamer profile until you Sign Out and Sign In again with more success.
Progress and settings cannot be saved while the gamer profile is unavailable.
Please enter the name for your published track:
The selected track could not be renamed because it seems to be corrupted.
There is already a track titled "%1" on the selected storage device, please try another name.
The track could not be renamed because it could no longer be found.
There is not enough space on the storage device for the rename operation.
Replay data is corrupted and will be deleted.
You don't have a replay for this track. Play the track first to save your replay.
Replay cannot be loaded as the storage device where the track is saved is not available.
The selected track is corrupted and replay for it cannot be shown. You should delete it in the Manage Tracks menu.
Replay could not be downloaded. Please check your network connection and try again.
Selected leaderboard item doesn't have a replay.
Session replay cache is corrupted and will be deleted.
Session replay could not be loaded.
You don't have a storage device selected where to load a replay.
The replay could not be saved.
You passed the track and won the bronze medal!
Result saving to Xbox LIVE was aborted!
You did not beat your old best

Track "%1" already exists on the selected storage device. Do you want to overwrite?
Tracks could not be downloaded because the selected storage device does not have room for all the selected tracks. Choose another storge device with more room.
Tracks could not be downloaded because the selected storage device already contains the maximum of 100 tracks.
The track you selected could not be loaded because it was corrupted.
The track you selected could not be loaded because the storage device which it is saved on was removed.
The track you selected could not be loaded because it could no longer be found.
The track you selected could not be loaded. Please make sure the track is still available.
All the selected tracks could not be uploaded. Your shared tracks selection has been modified to match the successfully uploaded tracks.
The track is locked. To unlock the track you need to play more tracks from the easier difficulty levels.
You must enter a name for the track
Your track was saved. You may now play it, share it or edit it in editor
The track could not be saved because the Device was removed.
The track you selected could not be saved because the selected storage device was removed.
The track could not be saved because there was no space.
The track could not be saved because the selected storage device already contains the maximum of 100 tracks.
The track cannot be saved because it contains too many objects. Reduce the number of objects and try again.
Play %1 more %DIFFPREV tracks to unlock %DIFFNEXT difficulty
Play %1 more %DIFFPREV track to unlock %DIFFNEXT difficulty
To unlock the %1, you need to get %2 in the "%3" tournament.
To unlock the %1, you need to unlock %2 difficulty.
To unlock the %1, you need to collect %NUM %RANK %MEDALS in racing mode on %3 difficulty.
To unlock the %1, you need to get %2 in the "%3" track.
Track upload could not be completed. Please check your network connection and, if necessary, reconnect to Xbox LIVE to try again.
